title: Ex Deorum
description: Port of the original Ex Nihilo to 1.20 and beyond.
body:
![Get a discounted server from BisectHosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/a5fb3e50-0699-4fb0-8573-fbb42c4ec37c.webp)
# Ex Deorum
### "From the Gods"
*Ex Deorum* is a port of the 1.7 SkyBlock companion mod *Ex Nihilo* by Erasmus_Crowley. It also borrows ideas from 
*Ex Nihilo Adscensio* by unascribed, *YUNoMakeGoodMap* by LexManos, and *Ex Compressum* by BlayTheNinth,
although *Ex Deorum* does not use code from any of those mods.

Unlike the original mod and any of its ports, *Ex Deorum* includes a SkyBlock world type out of the box.
All of this mod's recipes exist in data packs. The default recipes only cover items from Vanilla Minecraft,
and the sieve drops are generous enough that this mod should be playable without *Ex Compressum*.

This mod also adds a watering can item, an alternative to bone meal that should alleviate the need for mods like *Tree Growing Simulator*. There are six tiers, including a wooden watering can, which is given to the player at the start of the world along with a torch (both configurable).

*Ex Deorum* has JEI compatibility for all of its blocks, as well as a few useful [KubeJS functions](https://exdeorum.readthedocs.io/en/latest/kubejs/).

MODPACK MAKERS: You can add [CUSTOM BARRELS/SIEVES/CRUCIBLES](https://exdeorum.readthedocs.io/en/latest/customblocktypes/) using configuration files.

Suggestions? Questions about the mod? [Join the DISCORD](https://discord.gg/Z6CuaH36W4).
